goal: Verify the Messenginfo production domain configuration after Vercel reported misconfigured domains. Use real Chromium to check both apex and www hosts. Confirm whether messenginfo.com and www.messenginfo.com both serve the USCIS Helper / Messenginfo product, not the old LogiCheck / MC-DOT product. Capture screenshots and raw browser evidence.
